samples.xml_description: Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output product. Shift values for 8-bit multiplier. Register to hold the multiplicand. Register to accumulate the product. Counter for the number of iterations. if (i == 0) begin mult <= A; sum <= 0; end if (i <= 8) begin if (B[i] == 1'b1) begin sum <= sum + mult; end mult <= mult << 1; i <= i + 1; end
